title: Old piglin bartering
description: A datapack that adds the 1.16.1 piglin trades, chest loot and bastions back to the newest versions making speedrunning the game and just fast progression way easier.
body:
# Old piglin bartering
_A datapack that adds the 1.16.1 piglin trades, chest loot and bastions back to the newest versions making speedrunning the game and just fast progression way easier._
### New features
Because of all of the new features that would be unobtainable (like netherite upgrade templates and armor trims), the treasure bastion stays mostly untouched.
### Practical changes
- Classic bastion structure.
- Less items in the piglin bartering, making ender pearls trades more frequent (old bartering).
- Old chest loottables, making essential items more common.
